creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Same problem with 7-STABLE uipaq driver and Windows Mobile device.
 
   ucom0: <ASUS ASUS Windows Mobile Device, class 239/1, rev 2.00/0.00, addr 2> on uhub3
   
   When I'm trying to start two pppd on /dev/ttyU0 one after another I get a panic.
   Here are two reproduced equal panics:
    
 kernel: ucom0: open bulk out error (addr 3): IN_USE
   
 
 Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
 fault virtual address= 0x154
 fault code= supervisor read, page not present
 instruction pointer= 0x20:0xc04fc84f
 stack pointer        = 0x28:0xe4420c00
 frame pointer        = 0x28:0xe4420c28
 code segment= base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
 = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
 processor eflags= interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
 current process= 21 (irq16: nvidia0++)
 trap number= 12
 panic: page fault
 Uptime: 8m5s
 Physical memory: 1011 MB
 Dumping 68 MB: 53 37 21 5
 
 #0  doadump () at pcpu.h:195
 195__asm __volatile("movl %%fs:0,%0" : "=r" (td));
 (kgdb) bt
 #0  doadump () at pcpu.h:195
 #1  0xc056d413 in boot (howto=260) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:418
 #2  0xc056d60f in panic (fmt=Variable "fmt" is not available.
 ) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:572
 #3  0xc06b949c in trap_fatal (frame=0xe4420bc0, eva=340) at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:899
 #4  0xc06b9700 in trap_pfault (frame=0xe4420bc0, usermode=0, eva=340)
     at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:812
 #5  0xc06ba029 in trap (frame=0xe4420bc0) at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:490
 #6  0xc06a407b in calltrap () at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/exception.s:139
 #7  0xc04fc84f in usb_transfer_complete (xfer=0xc4c3cc00) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usbdi.c:947
 #8  0xc04ecb1b in uhci_transfer_complete (xfer=0xc4c3cc00) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:2109
 #9  0xc04ecc67 in uhci_idone (ii=Variable "ii" is not available.
 ) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:1449
 #10 0xc04ed16d in uhci_softintr (v=0xc3f8b000) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:1324
 #11 0xc04f8492 in usb_schedsoftintr (bus=0xc3f8b000) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usb.c:844
 #12 0xc04ede43 in uhci_intr1 (sc=0xc3f8b000) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:1224
 #13 0xc04ee10d in uhci_intr (arg=0xc3f8b000) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:1139
 #14 0xc054f4eb in ithread_loop (arg=0xc3fc7480) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_intr.c:1036
 #15 0xc054c396 in fork_exit (callout=0xc054f340 <ithread_loop>, arg=0xc3fc7480, frame=0xe4420d38)
     at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_fork.c:783
     #16 0xc06a40f0 in fork_trampoline () at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/exception.s:205
